story.text: As an AI keeping ontum's vocabulary honest, I need Causality to be a living, evidence-backed witness over the repo's own terminology — a surface that shows whether a term is alive, dead, overloaded, or pretending — because a handle severed from its evidence costs real money, and the system has no way today to tell a minted term from a ghost.

briefing.headline: Causality as a term-economy witness
briefing.value: The terminology-economy slice of epic.causality-surface: a pure read-only fold that takes a declared seed of terms and their candidate citations, resolves each citation against committed repo bytes by stable substring, and classifies each term by which evidence strata actually resolve — minted-runtime, minted-doctrine, minted-workflow, projected, proposed, poetic, overloaded, orphaned, or ghost.
briefing.why_now: bdo handed this session a fully-shaped /goal: make Causality a living witness over ontum's terminology, on a dedicated branch until validated to fold into main. It reads epic.the-field's fold and the glyph/language surfaces as evidence rather than double-building them (the §10 don't-double-build line).
briefing.if_accepted: Causality gains its first real sensor over the vocabulary: atom/receipt/node resolve minted-runtime; seam and arc surface as overloaded (two real senses each), each named as a gap to split. The repo stays truth; the seed is only a claim; promotion past proposed stays bdo's (D-4).
briefing.if_rejected: The vocabulary keeps drifting unwitnessed — a minted term and a ghost look the same until a retro finds the cost.
briefing.cost_of_wrong_call: Low: term_economy.py is a pure read-only fold (no writes but the one explicit projection regeneration); retiring it deletes files the log never depended on.
briefing.mechanism: causality/term_economy.py in the loop/gaps.py and census.py grain — stdlib, no network. Citations resolve by substring (an absent substring is exactly the ghost signal); a term is never minted by appearing here. Pinned by tests that prefer refuse-to-fit: no evidence can never mint, a ghost citation is flagged, two incompatible senses surface as overloaded, the projection reproduces byte-for-byte, and a fabricated classifier fails all three refusals.

_note: Birth record for the causality term-economy witness, authored to adopt PR #114 into the loop (bdo: 'I would like the orphans to be adopted', 2026-06-13). Never mutated; current verdicts are the fold over .ai-native/log/ (D-5).
